description: ElevenLabs v3 cases with explicit tags and ASR-assisted backchannel placement anchors.

cases.title: Deadline correction, tagged
cases.description: Speaker B corrects a deadline detail while Speaker A is finishing the setup.

speaker_a.text: [conversational] I think the design review is on Thursday afternoon, so we should send the notes by...
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: text is sent exactly as written.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: text is sent exactly as written.

cases.alignment_notes: Interruption case. Manually try B near the end of A.

cases.title: Collaborative completion, tagged
cases.description: Speaker B recognizes what Speaker A is referring to and completes the idea.

speaker_a.text: [casual] The thing that finally fixed the import bug was changing that one setting in the...
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: text is sent exactly as written.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: text is sent exactly as written.

cases.alignment_notes: Interruption/completion case. Manually try B near the end of A.

cases.title: Quiet schedule backchannel, tagged
cases.description: Speaker B gives a low-prominence acknowledgment while Speaker A continues speaking.

speaker_a.text: [matter-of-fact] After the morning call, I moved the budget review to next week, because finance still needs one more day to check the numbers.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A keeps the floor.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: text is sent exactly as written.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the anchor phrase.

cases.title: Neutral log-check backchannel
cases.description: Speaker B gives a minimal acknowledgment without an audio tag, for comparison.

speaker_a.text: [calm] I checked the logs from last night, and the restart happened right after the backup job finished, so the timing makes sense.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A continues the same turn.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: no delivery tag on the backchannel.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the anchor phrase.

backchannel_placement.anchor_text: I checked the logs from last night

cases.title: Backchannel after decision point
cases.description: Speaker B acknowledges right after Speaker A states the actual decision, while Speaker A continues with the reason.

speaker_a.text: [steady] We decided to keep the current rollout date, because moving it again would make the support schedule harder to manage.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A should keep the floor after the decision clause.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: very short acknowledgment after the decision is stated.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the anchor phrase.

backchannel_placement.anchor_text: We decided to keep the current rollout date

cases.title: Backchannel after problem statement
cases.description: Speaker B acknowledges after Speaker A states the problem, then Speaker A continues with the consequence.

speaker_a.text: [concerned] The main issue is that the upload sometimes fails without an error message, so the user thinks the file went through.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: continuous explanation with a clear clause boundary after the problem statement.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: no delivery tag on this backchannel.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the anchor phrase.

cases.title: Safety constraint interruption
cases.description: Speaker B interrupts to add a constraint before Speaker A completes the plan.

speaker_a.text: [planning aloud] We can ship the preview build to the test group this afternoon, as long as...
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A is planning aloud and leaves the condition unfinished.

speaker_b.text: [quickly] Only if the consent copy is updated first.
speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: quick but cooperative constraint.

cases.alignment_notes: Interruption case. Manually try B near the end of A.

cases.title: Missing context interruption
cases.description: Speaker B jumps in because a key context detail is missing.

speaker_a.text: [explaining] The dashboard numbers look lower this week, but that is probably because...
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A starts an explanation and leaves the cause open.

speaker_b.text: [jumping in] We excluded the trial accounts.

cases.alignment_notes: Interruption case. Manually try B near the end of A.
